introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.text: SCALEVOLT protects your privacy and personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.text: We collect the following types of information:

dataUsage.title: Data Usage
dataUsage.communication: Communicating with you about orders and support

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.text: We may share your data with:
dataSharing.businessTransfer: In case of company ownership change

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: Our website uses cookies to improve your experience. You can manage cookie settings in your browser.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.text: For questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us:

changes.title: Changes to Policy
changes.text: We may periodically update this Privacy Policy. Changes take effect from the moment they are published on our website.

effectiveDate.title: Effective Date
effectiveDate.text: This Privacy Policy takes effect from January 1, 2025.
